title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners:
K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners!
